content.value: Bathrooms, Kitchens &
Home Refurbishments
in Islington

subtitle.en-US: Owner-led, fully managed renovations delivered by an in-house team—clear quotes, reliable scheduling, and respectful workmanship.

content.value: Based in Islington (N9). Covering North London—larger projects considered across London.
Most renovation projects start from £10,000+.
Bathrooms from £8k · Kitchens from £15k · Refurbishments from £25k+.
13-month workmanship guarantee
on all renovation projects k22

title.en-US: A local team you can trust

content.value: We're a family-run, owner-led team based in Islington. We specialise in bathroom renovations, kitchen installations and full home refurbishments—delivering calm, organised projects for busy homeowners who want the job done properly.

From the first site visit to finishing touches, we manage the programme, coordinate trades, and keep communication clear. Smaller repairs and maintenance are also available for local clients who value a reliable team.
We lead with quality project work.
Smaller repairs are also available for existing clients and local residents.
Local repairs, maintenance and smaller improvements—bookable by WhatsApp with photos/video.
High-quality installation, waterproofing, tiling, plumbing and electrics—managed end to end.
Supply-and-install or fit-only, with coordinated electrics, plumbing, carpentry and finishing.
Multi-room refurbishments and reconfigurations, delivered by an in-house team with structured project management.

description.en-US: The landing page for Upper Street Contractors (Upper Street Handyman Ltd.) website.

defaultMetaDescription.en-US: Owner-led bathroom, kitchen and home refurbishment specialists in Islington. Delivering calm, organised projects for busy North London homeowners since 2016.

content.value: A link that redirects the user to the company's location and pops up a review window to review our business.
A link to open a conversation with the business on whatsapp.

Upper Street Contracts is led by a civil engineer with a background in construction management and project delivery. That experience shapes how we work: clear planning, realistic timelines, consistent site standards, and accountability throughout.
We're not trying to be the biggest builder in London—we focus on reliable execution, high-quality workmanship, and the kind of communication you'd expect from a professional team.

text.en-US: Owner-led project management with an engineering-led approach
In-house trades, plus long-term specialist partners when required
Respectful, tidy work in occupied homes
Trade purchasing support when we supply materials
Local to Islington—realistic scheduling and response times

content.value: 12-month workmanship guarantee
on all renovation work
We keep things straightforward so you always know what's
happening and what comes next.
We aim to return detailed quotes within 48 hours of the visit where possible (scope dependent).

stepDescription.en-US: For larger projects; small works often scoped from photos
Clear scope, breakdown and options provided

description.en-US: Layout changes · Kitchen · Bathroom · Decorating · Carpentry
Full strip-out · Wetroom-style shower · Custom tiling · New layout
Howdens supply-and-install · Structural opening · Underfloor heating
A selection of bathrooms, kitchens and refurbishments delivered across Islington and nearby areas.
